title: Vilfa patula
taxonomy: Vilfa patula is classified as a species of grass within the Poaceae family. It belongs to the tribe Poeae and is further classified within the subfamily Pooideae. The genus Vilfa is an outdated term and is often replaced with the genus Vilfa is sometimes classified under the genus Anthoxanthum. However, in some classifications, Vilfa patula is classified as Anthoxanthum australe. The classification may vary depending on the source and the current scientific understanding of plant taxonomy.
